---
title: "Yuanzhi Yu"
output: 
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
---

<img src="image/324.gif" style="width:60%"> 

***

### Contact

Yuanzhi Yu (Fisher)  
100 Haven AVE APT TOWER 3  
New York, New York 10032  
E-mail: yy3019@cumc.columbia.edu  
Phone: 1-646-284-6789

***
### Resume

[about me](Resume.html)

***
## Flexdashboard example

I choose [NY NOAA](ny_noaa.html).
